prompt: Compute the Riemann tensor of AdS5 in Poincare coordinates and confirm it is maximally symmetric.
conventions: mostly-plus signature; AdS radius L; coords (t,x1,x2,x3,z), z>0; curvature sign/index convention per references/wolfram-conventions.md.
note: Regression guard for the 'Riemann tensor AdS 5' Cowork failure: the delivered script must self-load lib/ by absolute path (MAuthor.wl AND GR.wl) and use full context prefixes, so it runs with no --load flags. Run with NO loads here.
